backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the INDO KIDZ backend with user profiles, homepage content management, fee categories, and payment records, protected by role-based access control (owner/admin/user) via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that AdminPanel.tsx implements owner-only access enforcement, showing AccessDeniedScreen to non-owners navigating directly to the admin route.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the INDO KIDZ Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Homepage, Fees Payment, and Admin Panel, wrapped in a Layout with Navbar, Footer, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a styled access-denied message with a lock icon and a back-to-homepage button for users who lack owner/admin permissions on the admin route.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentEdi: An admin form component for viewing and editing homepage content fields (hero text, tagline, about us, address, contact info), fetching current values and saving updates via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeeCategor: An admin UI for managing fee categories, supporting add, inline edit, and delete operations with confirmation dialogs, backed by React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentRec: An admin table displaying all payment records with search and status filter controls, allowing inline status updates (paid/pending/unpaid) via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with school branding, smooth-scroll quick links, a static location address, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar handling Internet Identity login/logout, auto-registering the first authenticated user as owner (guarded by hasOwner/isOwner checks), and conditionally showing a 'Customize Site' button only to confirmed owners.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name on first visit, saving the profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and showing a welcome toast on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query-based hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated calls and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, owner registration, homepage content, fee categories, and payment records.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm/energetic light and dark color theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page with tabs for content editing, fee category management, and payment records, accessible only to authenticated owners.
frontend/src/pages/FeesPayment.tsx: Fee payment page where users select a fee category, enter a student name, and submit a payment record, showing a success confirmation on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: Public homepage displaying hero section, about us, and fee categories fetched from the backend, with navigation to the fees payment page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3), recording an existing feature for owner-only Admin Panel access enforcement and a pending fix request (AR-1) to ensure the 'Customize Site' Navbar button is only visible to the authenticated owner.
